source_note: Entergy Arkansas, LLC's 2025 Rider FRP filing — Application for Approval of a Rate Adjustment and the 2025 Evaluation Report pursuant to Rate Schedule No. 44, Formula Rate Plan Rider (Rider FRP), filed July 7, 2025 with the Arkansas Public Service Commission in Docket No. 16-036-FR (proposing a $92.3 million rate adjustment; 48 pp).
